description:
On the next This Is My Architecture, Pedro from Orangetheory Fitness will explain how they built a global, scalable virtual workout classes system using native AWS services. You will learn how the Amazon Chime SDK is used to stream real-time video between coach and participants. How Chime SDK’s websockets are used to send heart rate telemetry in real time from the members to the coach. Finally, you will learn how the second by second heart rate telemetry is streamed to Firehose for later processing in OTF’s data lake.
